This is a new recipient (2 days) under the P2 threshold (5k < 9k). So it has a flag. Does the flag make it medium? The prompt doesn't define 'medium'. Usually, medium implies some concern but not clear rejection. Given the strict definition: 'low' = clearly none of P1/P2 apply. This fits. 'high' = plausibly rejectable. This is not rejectable. So it is low.
